selections.name: Johnny The Jet
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd at this track last start, looks primed to break through.

selections.name: Foxy Gisella
selections.reason: Solid 4th here recently, has upside and draws well.

selections.name: It's A Solid Deel
selections.reason: Has some okay form in the past, capable of placing.

selections.name: Nouveau Marche (NZ)
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw, could sneak into the exotics.

selections.name: Social Dancer
selections.reason: Strong 2nd at this track last start, ready to win despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Gingermac
selections.reason: Good 3rd here last time out, draws well and will be competitive.

selections.name: Tiddy Widdy (NZ)
selections.reason: Drops in class and has solid form lines to feature here.

selections.name: First Feeling (NZ)
selections.reason: Runner-up at Broken Hill recently, can carry that form over.

danger_horse.name: Conjoin
danger_horse.reason: Finished 5th here last start and can improve second-up.

selections.name: Star Casino
selections.reason: Won well at this track and distance last start, looks capable of repeating.

selections.name: Explicable
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter recently, draws well and will be in the finish.

selections.name: The Last Dance
selections.reason: Won two starts back, forgiving the last run over 1m.

selections.name: Hard Leaf
selections.reason: Winner at Oakbank two starts back, can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Fox Dunnett
danger_horse.reason: Not far behind Star Casino last start, has claims.

selections.name: Holder Maid
selections.reason: Impressive winner at this track and distance last start, the one to beat.

selections.name: Sea Roads
selections.reason: Runner-up to Holder Maid last time, gets a better draw here.

selections.name: Gusmao
selections.reason: Finished 3rd in the same key race, consistent and dangerous.

selections.name: Footprints (NZ)
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from Open company, watch for improvement.

danger_horse.name: Shinohara
danger_horse.reason: Can improve off recent runs and has ability on her day.

selections.name: Belle Inferno
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at this track last start, ready to peak.

selections.name: Exonumia
selections.reason: Good 2nd at Broken Hill last start, knocking on the door.

selections.name: Hot Off
selections.reason: Winner two starts back, can forgive the last run here.

selections.name: My Crackling
selections.reason: Draws well and has been racing consistently enough to place.

danger_horse.name: Elegant Man
danger_horse.reason: Not beaten far here last start, capable of surprising.

selections.name: Lady Memphis
selections.reason: Won nicely here last start, gets a great inside draw to repeat.

selections.name: Uncle Barry (NZ)
selections.reason: Runner-up to Lady Memphis last time, will be right there again.

selections.name: Love So Sweet
selections.reason: Broke maiden here last start with authority, can step up.

selections.name: Lava Lad
selections.reason: Drawn the rail and wasn't far away in a tougher race last time.

danger_horse.name: Raymond's Reward
danger_horse.reason: Winner two starts back, can bounce back from a flat run.

selections.name: Samanth
selections.reason: Strong winner here last start, can overcome the wide draw with early speed.

selections.name: The Last Stand
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Samanth last time, will be challenging late.

selections.name: Lakehurst
selections.reason: Winner two starts back, has the tactical speed to feature.

selections.name: Hedged Your Bets
selections.reason: Winner at Broken Hill two starts back, can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Wandering Eye
